zh.Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Engla: 英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德

zh.St Michael Churchyard, Bishops Stortford: 英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德
zh.lifeSummary: Johanna Momford是Edmond Momford的女兒，於1552年3月1日出生在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。她於1574年9月21日與Tobias Chandler在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1618年6月在她的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Johanna Momford是Edmond Momford的女儿，于1552年3月1日出生在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。她于1574年9月21日与Tobias Chandler在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1618年6月在她的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Momford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Mountford
meanings: English (Staffordshire; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montfort-sur-Risle (Eure) or from one or other of various places called Montfort in France (from Old French mont ‘hill’ + fort ‘fortress’). Early forms of this name are indistinguishable from those of Mundford in Norfolk, perhaps indicating an alternative habitational name (see Munford ).

History: A Norman bearer of this name, from Montfort-sur-Risle in Eure, near Brionne, accompanied William the Conqueror in his invasion of England in 1066. Simon de Montfort, 6th Earl of Leicester, led a rebellion against Henry III (1216–1272).

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Johanna Momford was born on 1 March 1552, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England as the daughter of Edmond Momford. She married Tobias Chandler on 21 September 1574, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died in June 1618, in her hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Johanna Momford est née le 1 mars 1552, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, fille d’Edmond Momford. Elle a épousé Tobias Chandler le 21 septembre 1574, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en juin 1618, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Johanna Momford wurde am 1. März 1552 in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, als Tochter von Edmond Momford geboren. Sie hat am 21. September 1574 in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England Tobias Chandler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb im Juni 1618 im Alter von 66 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Johanna Momford è nata il il 1 marzo 1552 nel Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England come figlia di Edmond Momford. Lei sposato Tobias Chandler il 21 settembre 1574, nel Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1618, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, England: イギリスベドフォードシュアイアチャルグラブ
ja.St Michael Churchyard, Bishops Stortford: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Momfordは1552年3月1日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードでEdmond Momfordの娘として生まれた。1574年9月21日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードでTobias Chandlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1618年6月に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Momford(은)는 1552년 3월 1일 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 Edmond Momford의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1574년 9월 21일 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 Tobias Chandler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1618년 6월 그녀의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Johanna Momford nasceu em 1 de março de 1552, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra filha de Edmond Momford. Ela casou-se com Tobias Chandler em 21 de setembro de 1574, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em junho de 1618, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Johanna Momford родилась 1 марта 1552 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия. Её отца звали Edmond Momford. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Tobias Chandler 21 сентября 1574 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла июнь 1618 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Johanna Momford nació el 1 de marzo de 1552, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra como hija de Edmond Momford. Se casó con Tobias Chandler el 21 de septiembre de 1574, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en junio de 1618, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
